before_code:
/* error_codes.h */
#ifndef ERROR_CODES_H
#define ERROR_CODES_H

#define ERR_OK           0
#define ERR_INVALID_ARG  1
#define ERR_TIMEOUT      2
#define ERR_NO_MEM       3
#define ERR_IO           4
#define ERR_BUSY         5
#define ERR_NOT_FOUND    6

#endif
after_code:
/* error_codes.h */
#ifndef ERROR_CODES_H
#define ERROR_CODES_H

#define ERR_OK           0
#define ERR_INVALID_ARG (-1)
#define ERR_TIMEOUT     (-2)
#define ERR_NO_MEM      (-3)
#define ERR_IO          (-4)
#define ERR_BUSY        (-5)
#define ERR_NOT_FOUND   (-6)

#endif
patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -3,11 +3,11 @@
 #define ERROR_CODES_H
 
 #define ERR_OK           0
-#define ERR_INVALID_ARG  1
-#define ERR_TIMEOUT      2
-#define ERR_NO_MEM       3
-#define ERR_IO           4
-#define ERR_BUSY         5
-#define ERR_NOT_FOUND    6
+#define ERR_INVALID_ARG (-1)
+#define ERR_TIMEOUT     (-2)
+#define ERR_NO_MEM      (-3)
+#define ERR_IO          (-4)
+#define ERR_BUSY        (-5)
+#define ERR_NOT_FOUND   (-6)
 
 #endif
description: All error code macros were changed from positive integers to negative integers, breaking any caller code that compares return values against the old positive constants.
